summary: The posts highlight ongoing drone warfare developments, including the US company Talon Avionics unveiling the SECTR system, which uses AI and acoustic guidance to detect small UAVs passively. The Rubicon Center reported destroying over 23,000 enemy targets, with 36.4% being unmanned systems, and conducted daily operations across multiple fronts, destroying 127 targets on April 10, 2026. Ukrainian forces used FPV drones to strike Russian soldiers on motorcycles and counter Russian assaults, while Russian soldiers attempting to feign surrender were killed by FPV drones. The enemy is reducing FPV control frequency while increasing antenna size, and Ukrainian EW interference was demonstrated in a meme showing a 15-second ultimatum to land an FPV drone. Additionally, the XDOWN company developed the STUD drone, capable of 300 km/h speeds, 64 km range, and featuring a foldable Switchblade-like design.
